title: Onboarding - Organized - Allow "Poly Lens" to use your location window [Android]
scenario: On the Organized onboarding screen, tapping "Enable now" triggers a location permission dialog with Allow Once, Allow while using app, and Don't allow options, while the user remains on the Organized page.
steps: Navigate to the 'Organized' screen during onboarding.
Observe the location permission dialog that appears.
expected: A location permission dialog appears titled "Allow Poly Lens to use your location" with options: "Allow Once" (or "Only This Time" on Android), "Allow while using app", and "Don't allow". The dialog text explains that Poly Lens uses location to find devices, with a link to the Privacy Policy in General Settings. The user remains on the Organized page in the background.
